instructions.instruction: Create a root biome.json with formatter and linter enabled, using the recommended ruleset and 2-space indentation.
instructions.relevant_when: Setting up Biome from scratch in an Nx workspace.
instructions.why_given: The skill teaches a root-first config strategy and specifies the baseline shape of biome.json.

instructions.instruction: Add biome-lint and biome-format targetDefaults to nx.json that include the root biome.json and the @biomejs/biome external dependency as cache inputs.
instructions.relevant_when: Configuring Nx caching for Biome targets.
instructions.why_given: The skill explicitly warns that omitting config and dependency inputs causes stale cache hits.

instructions.instruction: Add biome-lint and biome-format targets directly to a project's project.json, using the npx @biomejs/biome command with the project root as the path argument.
instructions.relevant_when: Wiring explicit per-project Biome targets instead of relying on a plugin.
instructions.why_given: The skill covers explicit project target configuration before describing the plugin-inference approach.

instructions.instruction: Use scoped overrides in biome.json to apply narrowly scoped rule relaxations for a legacy directory, instead of globally disabling rules.
instructions.relevant_when: Migrating a repository that has a legacy directory with many existing violations.
instructions.why_given: The skill prohibits blanket rule disablement and models the scoped-override pattern as the correct alternative.

instructions.instruction: When writing CI verification steps that include Biome checks, use check/lint mode rather than --write mode so that CI is read-only.
instructions.relevant_when: Producing CI configuration files (e.g. GitHub Actions workflow) that run Biome.
instructions.why_given: The skill explicitly prohibits write-mode formatting in CI verification jobs.
